code:
import io
import string

fn cap_word(_ w: String) -> String
  if string.is_empty(w)
    ""
  else
    match string.byte_at(w, 0)
    when Some(b)
      if b >= 97 and b <= 122
        let head = string.from_byte(b - 32)
        let rest = string.substring(w, 1, string.len(w))
        "#{head}#{rest}"
      else
        w
      end
    when None
      w
    end
  end
end

fn flush(_ result: String, _ word: String, _ first: Bool) -> String
  let cw = cap_word(word)
  if first
    cw
  else
    "#{result} #{cw}"
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    mut result = ""
    mut word = ""
    mut first = true
    mut i = 0
    let n = string.len(line)
    while i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9
          if not string.is_empty(word)
            result = flush(result, word, first)
            first = false
            word = ""
          end
        else
          word = "#{word}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    if not string.is_empty(word)
      result = flush(result, word, first)
    end
    println(result)
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
